commit_message:
Fix for SSI and BiSS encoder modules to correctly detect encoder loss Fix for SSI and BiSS encoder modules to correctly detect encoder loss * Encoder loss deduced from serial data from encoder not clock
* Loss detection common to master and sniffer
* For BiSS, just check for clock at startup as CRC will check data
* integrity. Serial clock is needed to interpret data frame.

CONN signal for SSI and BISS sniffer modules was showing as 1 (connected) when nothing was plugged into DB9 connector
